creator: shawn.webb@hardenedbsd.org
text:
I just released a new version of the www/drupal7-jailadmin project. Below is the patch to the port to reflect the update.

Fix: PORTNAME=      jailadmin
-DISTVERSION=   7.x-0.6.1
+DISTVERSION=   7.x-0.6.2
 CATEGORIES=    www
 MASTER_SITES=  http://0xfeedface.org/~shawn/projects/jailadmin/ \
                http://mirrors.rit.edu/zi/
